chunks.content:
Article: Are Kaworu and Rei literally Adam and Lilith
[]: Are Kaworu and Rei literally Adam and Lilith?             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Fri Oct 25, 2013 10:25 am Just thinking here, but let's look at this; Rei is the human clone of Yui Ikari, and she harbours the soul of the Angel Lilith inside of her. And then there's Kaworu, another lab grown entity (it can be assumed) that harbours the soul of Adam, recovered from Antarctica. So my question is this: When Rei talks, is it Lilith talking? When Kaworu makes a decision, is it Adam making it? When Rei thinks, is she thinking as Lilith? When Kaworu looks at the world, does he look at it as Adam? What does it mean to harbour a soul? Is it locked away somewhere, or is it literally them? Is Kaworu Adam, and is Rei Lilith?

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Fri Oct 25, 2013 11:09 am Well in Kaworu's case it seems (as far as can be discerned) that he sees things from Adam's point of view, as he refers to humans as Lilin and speaks of them as a separate entity from himself; he is also apparently aware of his role as the Angels' progenitor. In Rei's case it is more ambiguous, as Rei seemingly has no knowledge of her Angel heritage at all until Episode 24 when Kaworu reminds her about it. Thus for at least most of the series it seems Rei is not looking at things as Lilith; at the same time we can't really tell whether Lilith can be considered to have a similar 'personality' to Rei because, being an Angel, she doesn't talk.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Oct 25, 2013 11:26 am For Rei's case, there is also the fact that it's implied that her soul(Lilith) was divided : one in her Rei body, one presumably in EVA-00's core, and maybe a final part remaining in Lilith's body(the body is seen "talking" to her in EoE just before she merges back with it) It's possible that she didn't know that she was Lilith until episode 23 where she died alongside EVA-00, gaining a piece of her soul back. Then she remembered that there was something "

Article: Are Kaworu and Rei literally Adam and Lilith
 just before she merges back with it) It's possible that she didn't know that she was Lilith until episode 23 where she died alongside EVA-00, gaining a piece of her soul back. Then she remembered that there was something "special" with her(aside from being a clone ofc) but couldn't say exactly what, until Kaworu made her remember in episode 24, which is also the first time we saw her exhibit angelic powers(her immense AT Field which eroded Kaworu's so EVA-01 could catch him)
